# A triangular cookie
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=A%20triangular%20cookie&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = A triangular cookie
| slot = prism
| tier = ST
| desc = This blue balloon, the month of june!

| cost = 90
| feedp = 700
| fameb = 5
| minDmg = 100
| maxDmg = 250
| shots = 15
| range = yes
| lifetime = 600
| projSpeed = 80
| decoyDistance = 7
| decoySpeed = 0.93

| effects = yes
| decoy = 2

| bonuses = {{Stat|hp|18}} {{Stat|mp|18}} {{Stat|att|4}} {{Stat|vit|4}} {{Stat|wis|4}}

| lootbag = white
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavPrisms}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Prisms]]</noinclude>
